title: INPODAK Space Hopper, 18 Inches Hopper Ball, Spacehopper for Kids Age 3 to 6, Jumping Ball with Handle, Hopping Toy for Kids Age 3 4 5 6 Years Old Outdoor Garden Yard Game
features: [More Fun] INPODAK space hopper ball with blue purple cloud, makes it stand out and highly visible, which is attractive to little playmates

[Extra Strong] Jumping ball with handle is more stronger than the normal, it can safely hold 220 lbs in static. Inflatable bouncing ball with handle is made of durable vinyl material, which is anti-slip and free of BPA & heavy metals

[Easy Inflation] The 18-inch handle funnel ball can be inflated with a standard hand pump. A pump is included with the ball! The first inflation may take longer, so please be patient and inflate it thoroughly, and quickly insert the plug to maintain the ball's fullness. For optimal performance, re-inflate the ball one or two times after the initial inflation to allow the ball material to stretch fully, making it easier to inflate quickly next time.

[Recommended Age] The 18-inch Children's Space hopping Ball (jumping ball, bouncy ball, sit on and bounce hopper, space hop ball)) is an original jumping ball and the perfect gift for children aged 3 to 6. The recommended age is for reference only; please select based on the child's height and weight.

[Playable & Skills] Kids inflatable hop ball can burn energy off, promote coordination, balance and core development skills. Suitable for indoor and outdoor. Age under 3 should be under direct supervision of an adult
